name: Infermedica Symptom Assessment REST API
what_it_does: Infermedica symptom assessment REST API for digital health platforms, telehealth providers, and health insurance companies to integrate AI-powered symptom checking, medical triage, patient intake, and clinical decision support — enabling automated patient symptom collection, differential diagnosis suggestion, care pathway recommendation, and risk stratification through Infermedica's clinical AI engine built on probabilistic diagnostic reasoning. Enables AI agents to manage symptom assessment for adaptive symptom question and evidence collection automation, handle condition suggestion for differential diagnosis probability ranking automation, access triage recommendation for care level (self-care, primary care, ER) recommendation automation, retrieve risk factor collection for medical history and risk factor intake automation, manage explain management for diagnostic reasoning explanation automation, handle specialist recommendation for appropriate medical specialist routing automation, access lab test suggestion for relevant laboratory test recommendation automation, retrieve follow-up for next-symptom question sequencing and adaptive interview automation, manage mention parsing for NLP symptom extraction from patient text automation, and integrate Infermedica with EHR, telehealth, and patient portal systems for digital health triage automation.
use_cases: Building conversational symptom checkers and medical triage chatbots for digital health automation agents
Automating patient intake and pre-visit symptom collection for telehealth automation agents
Routing patients to appropriate care levels and specialists for healthcare navigation automation agents
Extracting symptoms and risk factors from patient-entered text for clinical intake automation agents
not_for: Clinical decision support for licensed physicians making diagnostic decisions (Infermedica supports patients and triage, not physician-level diagnosis)
Lab result interpretation and diagnostic imaging analysis (Infermedica is symptom-based, not lab/imaging AI)
Emergency medical care automation (Infermedica recommends ER for emergencies but is not a replacement for emergency medical care)
best_when: A digital health platform, health insurer, or telehealth provider wanting AI agents to automate patient symptom collection, triage recommendation, and care pathway routing through Infermedica's medical AI symptom assessment engine.
avoid_when: MEDICAL DISCLAIMER IS REQUIRED: Infermedica provides symptom assessment, not medical diagnosis; automated diagnosis-tool assumption creates medical_liability_risk for deployments presenting Infermedica results as definitive diagnoses; automated must clearly communicate the non-diagnostic nature of results to users. AGE AND SEX ARE REQUIRED: Infermedica's diagnostic model requires patient age and biological sex for accurate assessment; automated generic-assessment assumption creates model_accuracy_degradation for assessments without age/sex context; automated must collect age and sex before beginning symptom assessment. EVIDENCE STRUCTURE IS SPECIFIC: Symptoms, risk factors, and observations use Infermedica's medical concept IDs; automated free-text assumption creates concept_not_found for symptoms not mapped to Infermedica concept IDs; automated must map symptoms to Infermedica concept IDs via the NLP mention endpoint. REGIONAL AVAILABILITY AFFECTS CONDITIONS: Infermedica's condition database coverage varies by region; automated global-condition assumption creates condition_not_available for region-specific conditions not in Infermedica's knowledge base; automated should validate regional condition coverage for target user population.

auth.notes: Infermedica uses API key for Symptom Assessment REST API. REST API with JSON. Wroclaw, Poland HQ. Founded 2012 by Piotr Orzechowski. Raised $30M+. Products: Infermedica API (symptom checker), Infermedica Triage (patient intake), Infermedica Navigator. 120+ million health interviews conducted. 35+ languages supported. Covers 1,700+ conditions and 2,200+ symptoms. Deployed by Allianz, AXA, Optum. Competes with Buoy Health, Symptomate, and K Health for AI symptom assessment.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Developer plan: free with limited monthly API calls (100-200 calls/month); production requires paid plan
pricing.paid_tiers: Monthly subscription; Starter, Professional, Enterprise tiers; per-call pricing at higher volumes; enterprise custom pricing
pricing.notes: Wroclaw PL. $30M raised. Free developer tier. 120M+ health interviews. 35+ languages. Global digital health AI.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per API key; symptom assessment APIs throttled per plan tier

known_agent_gotchas: INTERVIEW IS STATEFUL AND ADAPTIVE: Infermedica's symptom interview is stateful; automated stateless assumption creates incoherent_interview for assessments not maintaining the full evidence array across question-answer cycles; automated must accumulate evidence across all interview turns

EVIDENCE ARRAY GROWS EACH TURN: Each new symptom/answer must be appended to the evidence array, not replace it; automated replace assumption creates evidence_lost for interview turns that overwrite previous evidence; automated must append new evidence to existing evidence array

CONCEPT IDs ARE MEDICAL CODES: Infermedica uses its own medical concept IDs (e.g., s_21 for headache); automated ICD-code assumption creates concept_not_found for symptoms specified with ICD codes instead of Infermedica IDs; automated must use Infermedica concept IDs from the concept library or NLP parser

INITIAL EVIDENCE SEEDS THE INTERVIEW: The first API call should include chief complaint as initial evidence; automated empty-start assumption creates generic_questions for interviews without initial symptom to focus assessment; automated must provide initial symptom evidence to begin targeted interview

TRIAGE SHOULD ALWAYS BE LAST: Triage API call (care level recommendation) should be called after sufficient evidence collection; automated early-triage assumption creates low_confidence_triage for triage calls without sufficient symptom evidence; automated should collect adequate symptoms before requesting triage recommendation
agent_readiness.security_notes: Medical AI. GDPR, HIPAA, ISO13485. API key. EU/US. Patient symptom and health assessment data.

security_score_components.security_notes: Medical AI. GDPR, HIPAA, ISO13485. API key. EU/US. Patient symptom and health assessment data.
